runs.title: Random semicircle threshold
runs.question: For n independent uniform points on the unit circle, how does the probability that all points lie in some semicircle vary with n, and can a reproducible simulation recover the exact law?

runs.title: Coprime-pair density
runs.question: For uniformly sampled integer pairs (a,b) in {1,...,N}^2, how quickly does the observed coprime proportion approach 6/pi^2 as N grows?

runs.title: Fixed points of random permutations
runs.question: How rapidly does the distribution of fixed points of a uniformly random permutation converge to Poisson(1), and which finite-n statistics reveal the leading discrepancy?

projects.title: Fixed points of random permutations
projects.question: How rapidly does the distribution of fixed points of a uniformly random permutation converge to Poisson(1), and which finite-n statistics reveal the leading discrepancy?
projects.abstract: Automated end-to-end rehearsal validation of typed AI-to-Monte-Carlo-to-interpretation flow.
